text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As I'm relaxing at an outdoor cafe...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Um... Sky?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: What's up, Flower? You're mumbling.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Um, do we... stand out?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huh? No way.

text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text:
Look, look! They're so cute! ♪ They must be from
Tracen Academy!

text_block_list.name: Woman B
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yeah. They must be on break! I'm shocked
they know about this place. What mature girls
they are! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Ahhh... I think we should go.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Why? Our drinks haven't even come yet.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: But... everyone around us is staring...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Weren't you the one who kept saying you wanted
to come here?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Something about it being all "chic" and
"grown-up"?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I did, but... I don't know if I was ready for this
place yet.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hmph...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Flower, take a look at that customer over there.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Over there?
choice_data_list: (I feel like someone's staring at me...)

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
See how calm they are? They're not put off by
how fancy this place is.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: That's because they're an adult...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Well then, do you know what makes someone an
adult?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
It's having the confidence to not be bothered by
things like this. It's all about confidence.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Confidence!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yep! You wanted to be more mature, right?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Then you gotta act like it! Start adulting!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: A-adulting? Uhhh...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hmph!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Ooh... Yeah, that's it. Very mature. I'm sure our
friend over there would agree—wouldn't you?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: What? Really?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
See, what did I tell ya? You're becoming more
mature already!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I see. I'm... mature. ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yep, so just relax already. Feel the nice breeze.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
No! I told you already, I have training soon, so I
can't stay for too long!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah? ...I think I've given you too much
confidence.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: S-Sky?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
What? I was wrong? Okay, then try giving us a
smile.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I'm sure that'll make you look more mature.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Really? Okay...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: How's this? Heehee... ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ooh, yeah! Sooo cute! ☆

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Sky... Are you... making fun of me?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Whaaaat? Nooo!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, our drinks are coming! Make sure you look
mature!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh? Ah, ah!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hmph!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Wait, Skyyy!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Nyahaha! ☆
